Homeless.name: Homeless
Homeless.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a quiet urban street corner with simplified shapes. A small sleeping bag and a stack of cardboard boxes rest against a plain wall beneath a single streetlamp. A paper cup and a worn notebook sit nearby. Clean lines, muted cozy color palette of soft greys and warm blues, no realistic detail, just simple geometric forms conveying the humble beginnings of a writer.

Rented Room.name: Rented Room
Rented Room.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a small rented room rendered with simplified shapes. A basic desk holds a stack of papers and a small lamp, a single window shows a soft blue night sky, and a narrow bed sits against the wall. Clean lines, cozy aesthetic, muted palette of warm beiges and soft blues, no realism, just simple geometric forms creating a humble writer's space.

Studio.name: Studio
Studio.imageprompt: A flat, minimalist vector illustration of a tidy studio apartment using simple geometric shapes. Cozy aesthetic with warm amber and soft grey tones, clean lines, no realistic detail, conveying a hopeful emerging writer's home.
